Port St. Lucie Home Loans

FHA loans in Port St. Lucie, Florida

Port St. Lucie is one of Florida's fastest-growing and most affordable cities, packed with master-planned communities like Tradition and St. Lucie West and a steady supply of new construction. That combination makes it one of the friendliest markets in the state for FHA buyers: prices that sit well within the FHA limit, and brand-new homes that breeze through the FHA appraisal.

St. Lucie County FHA limit (1-unit)$541,287

2026 single-family

Minimum down3.5%

With a 580+ score

Min credit score580

500–579 with 10% down

Property types1–4 units

Owner-occupied

What the FHA limit means in Port St. Lucie

With the 2026 FHA limit of $541,287 and FHA's 3.5% minimum down, you can finance a Port St. Lucie home priced up to roughly $560,000 (your loan covers the price minus your down payment). In fast-growing, affordable Port St. Lucie, that covers the vast majority of homes — including many new builds. A few Florida counties are set higher, so confirm St. Lucie County's exact figure with HUD.

FHA and new construction in Port St. Lucie

Port St. Lucie's new-construction communities are a natural match for FHA. Newer homes meet FHA's property standards easily, and the area's prices leave plenty of room under the loan limit — ideal for first-time buyers. Pair FHA's 3.5% down with Florida down payment assistance and gift funds, and many Port St. Lucie buyers get in with very little out of pocket. Use our calculator to estimate your payment.

Down payment help for Port St. Lucie buyers

You don't have to cover the down payment alone. FHA allows gift funds, sellers can contribute up to 6% toward closing costs, and Port St. Lucie buyers can often pair FHA with assistance from the Florida Housing Finance Corporation and St. Lucie County's local SHIP-funded programs. Funding and eligibility change frequently, so we'll help you confirm what's currently available — see our FHA down payment assistance guide.

Neighborhoods we serve in Port St. Lucie

We help buyers throughout Port St. Lucie and St. Lucie County, including Tradition, St. Lucie West, the Riverland area, and surrounding Treasure Coast communities. Wherever you're looking, we'll explain your FHA loan limit, rate, and monthly payment — and get you pre-approved fast.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in Port St. Lucie (St. Lucie County) for 2026?+
St. Lucie County is at the 2026 Florida FHA floor of $541,287, which covers nearly all Port St. Lucie homes. Confirm the exact figure with HUD's official lookup.
Is Port St. Lucie a good market for FHA buyers?+
Yes — it's one of the most FHA-friendly markets in Florida thanks to affordable prices and abundant new construction that meets FHA standards.
Does FHA work for new-construction homes in Port St. Lucie?+
Absolutely. Newer homes typically pass the FHA appraisal easily, and there's a lot of new inventory in communities like Tradition.
How much down payment do I need in Port St. Lucie?+
As little as 3.5% with a 580+ score, reduced further with gift funds and Florida down payment assistance.
Do you serve all of St. Lucie County?+
Yes — Port St. Lucie, Fort Pierce, and the surrounding Treasure Coast.
